name: Night Kingdom RPG
description:
Welcome to the Night Kingdom RPG! This scenario takes places in old Night Kingdom from Wings of Fire books series, long before events of Darlstalker book! You can be a Queen and lead your tribe into greatness, or any other member of royalty or be any other dragon, a guard, a servant, an assassin, a student, a commoner. You can be a seer, a mind-reader or become an animus dragon before the Darkstalker.

Night Kingdom, is an ancient city that inhabited by the NightWing tribe. It is located south of the Kingdom of Sand, on a peninsula known as the Talon Peninsula. The kingdom's terrain consists of a vast landscape caverns and ravines, glowing with firelight and echoing with the flutter of wings. There are secret canyons and caves carved into the rock all across the terrain, some of them stretching towards the distant sea. The kingdom is surrounded by a series of sharp-edged mountains.

It is my first RPG. And i was tried to fit all important and crytical information in small number of tokens. It is on testing stage and it going to be updated!

(IMPORTANT REMINDER: Bot has a bad habit to take control over your character. Looks like it is common problem. So i highly recommend to write something like [OOC: never take control over my character, control only other NPC's] if it roleplay as your character, and remove parts of message where bot roleplay as you. And it should work in many cases.)

Please, share your experience in the comments!

Art by: Biohazardia (it is only picture that fits this roleplay, there are no Darkstalker and Clearsight NPC's )
